desc: ClashManagerExportResultsToExcelCommand — .xlsx export via ClosedXML with embedded clash images.
summary: ClashManagerExportResultsToExcelCommand — .xlsx export via ClosedXML with embedded clash images.
precondition: Active doc; ClosedXML available; staging DB has ≥ 1 row.
logictree:
1) Resolve output path (default .mepbridge/qa/reports/clashes_{ts}.xlsx).
2) Resolve image root (default .mepbridge/qa/images).
3) Delegate to SaveClashResultsToExcelFile.WriteReport.
4) Open on Human path.
5) Emit ok + output_path + rows.
